title: dactylorhiza maculata var. wettsteinii
intro: Dactylorhiza maculata var. wettsteinii, also known as the spotted marsh orchid, is a type of orchid species that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various health issues, including respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Dactylorhiza maculata var. wettsteinii include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe respiratory issues, and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the roots and rhizomes in water or alcohol to create a medicinal tea or tincture.
